title: Implement food safety program
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement food safety program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify microbiological hazards for meat and meat safety

pcs.text: Identify types of micro-organisms (e.g. bacteria, virus, yeast and mould)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify types of micro-organisms (e.g. bacteria, virus, yeast and mould)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify types of micro-organisms (e.g. bacteria, virus, yeast and mould).

pcs.text: Identify major microbiological threats to meat (i.e. bacteria and relevant yeasts or moulds) and assess to determine the risk level and control requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify major microbiological threats to meat (i.e. bacteria and relevant yeasts or moulds) and assess to determine the risk level and control requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify major microbiological threats to meat (i.e. bacteria and relevant yeasts or moulds) and assess to determine the risk level and control requirements.

pcs.text: Identify types of bacteria causing food poisoning and meat spoilage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify types of bacteria causing food poisoning and meat spoilage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify types of bacteria causing food poisoning and meat spoilage.

pcs.text: Identify effects of bacterial contamination in relation to food poisoning (i.e. impact on people) and food spoilage (i.e. shelf life)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify effects of bacterial contamination in relation to food poisoning (i.e. impact on people) and food spoilage (i.e. shelf life)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify effects of bacterial contamination in relation to food poisoning (i.e. impact on people) and food spoilage (i.e. shelf life).

pcs.text: Identify sources of bacterial contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sources of bacterial contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sources of bacterial contamination.

pcs.text: Identify and explain growth characteristics and requirements of bacteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain growth characteristics and requirements of bacteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain growth characteristics and requirements of bacteria.

pcs.text: Identify Critical Control Points (CCP) and control points for prevention and control of bacterial contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify Critical Control Points (CCP) and control points for prevention and control of bacterial contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify Critical Control Points (CCP) and control points for prevention and control of bacterial contamination.

pcs.text: Determine and implement control methods required to prevent or reduce microbiological hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and implement control methods required to prevent or reduce microbiological hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and implement control methods required to prevent or reduce microbiological hazards.

pcs.text: Identify customer and regulatory requirements for microbiological contamination levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify customer and regulatory requirements for microbiological contamination levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify customer and regulatory requirements for microbiological contamination levels.

pcs.text: Identify relevant microbiological tests and assess test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant microbiological tests and assess test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant microbiological tests and assess test results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify microbiological hazards for meat and meat safety

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and implement control methods which prevent or reduce chemical contamination to acceptable levels including national programs (e.g. residue testing).

pcs.text: Explain effects of chemical residues on meat (e.g. poisoning, tainting, and rejections)

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify chemical residue testing programs and level requirements.
